metadata.notes: Generated by Protocol Intelligence Platform. SR- IDs are placeholders.

general_information.notes: To be completed by Risk Manager upon IRMS entry

study_overview.title: Phase 3, Randomized, Open-Label Study of Vepdegestrant (ARV-471) Plus Palbociclib vs Letrozole Plus Palbociclib in Participants With ER(+)/HER2(-) Advanced Breast Cancer (VERITAC-3)

critical_factors.critical_data: Progression-free survival (PFS) by BICR; Objective Response Rate (ORR); Clinical Benefit Response (CBR); Duration of Response (DoR); Overall Survival (OS); PK data (vepdegestrant, palbociclib); PRO data (EQ-5D-5L, EORTC QLQ-C30, EORTC QLQ-BR23)
critical_factors.critical_process: Accurate completion and timely transmission of tumor scans to BICR per protocol requirements; PK sample collection at specified timepoints; PRO questionnaire completion by participants prior to clinical assessments

critical_process.signal: PFS by blinded independent central review (BICR)

critical_factors.critical_data: AE/SAE data; Incidence of Grade 4 neutropenia; ECG abnormalities (QTcF); Clinically significant laboratory abnormalities
critical_factors.critical_process: AE/SAE reporting and monitoring; Strict adherence to dose reduction or drug discontinuation rules for toxicities (especially neutropenia); Cardiac monitoring via ECG

critical_process.signal: Exclusion for QTcF >470 msec on screening ECG

critical_factors.factor_name: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results
critical_factors.critical_data: BICR scan data; ctDNA and TK1 biomarker data; Concomitant medication records
critical_factors.critical_process: Ensuring BICR remains blinded to treatment assignment despite the open-label study design; Proper handling, processing, and shipment of biomarker samples (ctDNA/TK1); Strict verification of CYP3A inhibitor/inducer washouts

critical_factors.critical_data: ER+/HER2- status confirmation; Prior systemic therapy history; Baseline tumor and blood sample availability; Hepatic, renal, and cardiac lab values
critical_factors.critical_process: Verification of ER+/HER2- status via local/central assay on most recent tumor biopsy; Confirmation of no prior systemic therapy for advanced disease; Verification of mandatory tumor sample provision for Phase 3 participants

critical_data.signal: No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for advanced disease

critical_process.signal: Phase 3 ONLY. Participants must provide a blood sample AND a tumor sample

critical_factors.critical_data: Dosing data for Vepdegestrant, Palbociclib, Letrozole, and LHRH agonists; Dose reductions and discontinuations
critical_factors.critical_process: Participant education and compliance monitoring for complex oral regimens (continuous Vepdegestrant vs. 21-days-on/7-days-off Palbociclib); Administration of LHRH agonist for pre-/peri-menopausal participants

critical_data.signal: Palbociclib 100 mg QD Days 1-21, then 7 days off

risks.risk_description: Enrolled participant(s) do not meet protocol eligibility criteria, specifically regarding prior therapies, ER+/HER2- status, or required tumor biopsies.
risks.additional_context: The protocol has 24 complex eligibility criteria, including strict confirmation of ER+/HER2- status, no prior systemic therapy for advanced disease, specific cardiac/hepatic/renal cutoffs, and a mandatory provision of a tumor sample at diagnosis (or de novo biopsy) for Phase 3 participants.

associated_causes.cause: Misinterpretation of prior therapy lines for advanced vs. early breast cancer

usdm_trigger.signal: No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for their locoregionally advanced or metastatic disease

associated_causes.cause: Failure to secure required archival or de novo tumor tissue prior to randomization

usdm_trigger.signal: Phase 3 ONLY. Participants must provide a blood sample AND a tumor sample

controls.control_description: Medical monitor review of eligibility criteria for the first 3 participants at each site, focusing on prior therapy history and tumor sample availability.
controls.additional_context: Ensures complex oncology eligibility criteria are met before randomization.

intelligence.notes: The protocol has 24 complex eligibility criteria, including strict confirmation of ER+/HER2- status, no prior systemic therapy for advanced disease, specific cardiac/hepatic/renal cutoffs, and a manda

risks.risk_description: Samples incorrectly obtained, analyzed, stored or handled, particularly PK, ctDNA, and tumor biopsy samples.
risks.additional_context: The study involves extensive PK sampling for vepdegestrant and palbociclib, as well as exploratory biomarker sampling (TK1, ctDNA) and mandatory tumor biopsies for Phase 3, requiring precise timing and handling.

associated_causes.cause: Site staff miss specific PK draw timepoints relative to dosing

usdm_trigger.signal: Plasma concentrations of vepdegestrant and palbociclib

associated_causes.cause: Improper processing or shipment of sensitive ctDNA or TK1 biomarker samples

usdm_trigger.signal: ctDNA quantitative changes and TK1 measurements

critical_factors_linked: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results

controls.control_description: Provide detailed laboratory manual and site training specifically focused on PK timing and ctDNA sample processing.
controls.additional_context: Critical for exploratory and secondary endpoints.

risks.risk_description: Participant takes prohibited concomitant medication(s), specifically strong CYP3A inhibitors or inducers.
risks.additional_context: Concurrent administration of strong CYP3A inhibitors or inducers is strictly prohibited and requires a 7-day or 14-day washout period prior to randomization, respectively, to avoid dangerous PK interactions with study drugs.

associated_causes.cause: Participant fails to disclose herbal supplements or over-the-counter CYP3A inhibitors/inducers

usdm_trigger.signal: Concurrent administration of medications, food or herbal supplements that are strong inhibitors or strong inducers of CYP3A

associated_causes.cause: Inadequate washout period observed prior to randomization

usdm_trigger.signal: Prior use of strong CYP3A inhibitors must be stopped 7 days before randomization

critical_factors_linked: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results

controls.control_description: Implement eCRF edit checks to flag the entry of any prohibited CYP3A inhibitors or inducers in the ConMed log.
controls.additional_context: Helps detect prohibited meds early to prevent safety issues.

risks.risk_description: Data collected from the trial or reliability of trial results are not as expected, particularly regarding BICR assessments in an open-label setting.
risks.additional_context: While the study is open-label, the primary endpoint (PFS) relies on Blinded Independent Central Review (BICR). There is a risk that central reviewers could be inadvertently unblinded by site-submitted documents or scan metadata.

associated_causes.cause: Site staff inadvertently include treatment assignment information in scan uploads or clinical notes sent to BICR
Inconsistent scan modalities used across visits, complicating BICR assessment

usdm_trigger.signal: Progression-free survival (PFS) by blinded independent central review (BICR)

critical_factors_linked: Data Integrity and Reliability of Trial Results

controls.control_description: Imaging vendor to implement strict data de-identification and blinding checks before scans are routed to independent reviewers.
controls.additional_context: Ensures the integrity of the primary efficacy endpoint.

intelligence.notes: While the study is open-label, the primary endpoint (PFS) relies on Blinded Independent Central Review (BICR). There is a risk that central reviewers could be inadvertently unblinded by site-submitted

risks.risk_description: Trial conduct adversely impacted by participant error, particularly regarding complex oral dosing schedules and ePRO completion.
risks.additional_context: Participants must manage a complex oral regimen (continuous vepdegestrant + 21-days-on/7-days-off palbociclib) and complete multiple PROs (EQ-5D-5L, EORTC QLQ-C30, EORTC QLQ-BR23) to support secondary endpoints.

associated_causes.cause: Participant confusion regarding the 21-days-on/7-days-off schedule for palbociclib versus continuous vepdegestrant

usdm_trigger.signal: Palbociclib 100 mg QD Days 1-21, then 7 days off

associated_causes.cause: Participant fatigue leading to missing or incomplete ePRO questionnaire data

usdm_trigger.signal: Patient-reported outcomes using EQ-5D-5L, EORTC QLQ-C30, and EORTC QLQ-BR23

controls.control_description: Provide participants with clear, visual dosing diaries and calendars to track the 21/7 palbociclib schedule alongside continuous vepdegestrant.
controls.additional_context: Reduces the risk of dosing errors at home.
